name: Amazon
description: Shop millions of products from everyday essentials to tech and home goods through one of the world’s largest online marketplaces.

name: Walmart
description: Browse low-priced groceries, household essentials, electronics, and more from a dependable everyday retailer.

name: eBay
description: Discover new and used products across categories, from collectibles to electronics and fashion favorites.

name: Apple
description: Shop premium smartphones, laptops, tablets, headphones, and accessories from one of the most iconic tech brands.

name: Booking.com
description: Book hotels, apartments, and stays worldwide with flexible options for both business and leisure travel.

name: Expedia
description: Find flights, hotels, rental cars, and vacation packages for your next trip in one convenient place.

name: Costco
description: Save on bulk essentials, electronics, household items, and everyday favorites with warehouse-style value.

name: Target
description: Shop groceries, home décor, apparel, beauty, and seasonal essentials in one easy destination.

name: The Home Depot
description: Find tools, appliances, hardware, garden supplies, and home improvement essentials for every project.

name: Best Buy
description: Shop the latest tech, appliances, and entertainment gear with expert product selection and competitive pricing.

name: AliExpress
description: Explore a vast selection of budget-friendly products across fashion, gadgets, home items, and accessories.

name: IKEA
description: Shop modern furniture, décor, and practical home solutions for every room and budget.

name: Etsy
description: Discover handmade, vintage, and unique goods from independent sellers around the world.

name: Nike
description: Shop performance footwear, athletic apparel, and training gear from a global sportswear leader.

name: adidas
description: Find versatile sportswear, sneakers, and lifestyle apparel designed for training and everyday wear.

name: Samsung
description: Browse phones, TVs, appliances, and smart devices from a major technology brand.

name: Dell
description: Shop laptops, desktops, monitors, and business technology solutions built for performance.

name: Lenovo
description: Explore dependable laptops, tablets, and work-from-home devices for everyday and professional use.

name: ASOS
description: Discover trendy fashion, accessories, and everyday essentials with a modern, style-focused catalog.

name: H&M
description: Shop affordable fashion for men, women, and kids with timeless basics and seasonal styles.

name: Uniqlo
description: Browse minimalist essentials, modern staples, and everyday wardrobe pieces in a simple, functional style.

name: Lululemon
description: Find premium activewear, yoga apparel, and performance essentials for fitness and everyday comfort.

name: Puma
description: Shop sporty footwear, apparel, and accessories designed for training, running, and casual wear.

name: New Balance
description: Explore performance sneakers and athletic essentials known for comfort, support, and everyday versatility.

name: Under Armour
description: Shop performance apparel and training gear built for athletes, gym sessions, and active lifestyles.
